creator: jah4007@cs.rit.edu
text:
Ok, here we go.

http://www.rit.edu/~jah4007/FreeBSD/cups/newcups

There are two shell archives for the new sub ports, and a patch to make the 
main cups port into a meta port (don't forget to remove the files listed in 
the README). Just look at the cups meta port for what to use as dependencies. 

Please review these, and if I don't hear any commit volunteers (assuming 
there are no problems) then I will submit an update pr next week. Once this 
gets committed, I will email the maintainers of samba, xpp, and well, kde 
already is listening ;P about the dependency change.

James
